channel.title: SK Cyberops Intelligence Feed
channel.description: Technical deep-dives, security research, and cyber intelligence reports from SK Cyberops.

item.title: Fortigate Architecture & Packet FLow
item.description: Technical breakdown of Fortigate Networks firewall architecture and packet flow.

item.title: How Paloalo firewall are next gen firewalls using user-id content-id app-id technology compared to other competitors?
item.description: How Paloalo firewall are next gen firewalls using user-id content-id app-id technology compared to other competitors? - Technical Intelligence Report.

item.title: The 47-Day Certificate Timeline: Understanding SC-081v3
item.description: Understanding the industry shift to 47-day TLS certificate validity and the impact on enterprise automation.

item.title: what is ADCS
item.description: A deep dive into Active Directory Certificate Services (ADCS) and its role in enterprise PKI.

item.title: Palo Alto Architecture & Packet Flow
item.description: Technical breakdown of Palo Alto Networks firewall architecture and single-pass parallel processing (SP3) packet flow.

item.title: Firewall Rule Syntax
item.description: A guide to standard firewall rule syntax and best practices for policy management.

item.title: PCAP Analysis Basics
item.description: Introduction to network traffic analysis using Wireshark and PCAP files.

item.title: Understanding Certificate File Formats
item.description: Decoding the differences between PEM, DER, CRT, and PFX certificate formats.
